title: Glimbing Talent Enchantment
description: Climb more easily by increases the step height with a simple enchantement
body:
Glimbing Talent is an enchantment that facilitates your exploration by easily traverse the relief of your world. This simple enchantment allows you to walk and step full blocks without jumping, like you would normally do with stairs and slabs, by increasing your step height.

The Glimbing Talent enchantment can be placed on leggings and have two levels: level 1 allows you to climb escarpement of 1 block, level 2 allows you to climb 2 blocks at once. As well as making it easier to climb, the enchantment gives you a slight bonus for avoiding fall damage.

This enchantment can be obtained from the enchantment table, found in the various chests naturaly generated and by trading with the Librarian's. Note that you have low chance to found a naturaly generated level 2 Glimbing Talent.

- Level I: +0.5 Step Height (1 block step)
- Level II: +1.5 Step Height (2 blocks step)
